title: oauth2-proxy GetRequestPath fragment confusion bypasses skip_auth_routes
description: GetRequestPath returns parsedURL.Path without stripping the URL fragment. Backends that interpret '#' as a fragment delimiter route on the path before '#', while oauth2-proxy regex-matches the longer path-with-fragment against skip_auth_routes. An attacker can craft a request whose pre-fragment path is protected but whose path-plus-fragment satisfies a public allowlist regex (or the URL-encoded form '%23'), bypassing authentication.
